body.purpose: Dense Chinese product copy, helper text, and panel descriptions.

label.purpose: Compact metadata, section labels, and status hints.

motion.rule: Motion communicates state only; do not animate layout-driving properties.

componentNotes.sidebar: Desktop fixed left rail at 264px. Phone breakpoint turns it into a compact sticky top nav with horizontal scrolling.
componentNotes.tableShell: Use table-shell--visible-scrollbar for wide financial tables and keep numeric columns from wrapping.
componentNotes.drawer: Assistant and audit drawers use panel-strong, side shadow, aria-modal, and 100vw width on phones.
componentNotes.settingsFields: Settings controls should share field structure and visible height; avoid bespoke one-off checkbox rows.

dos: Keep A-share and local simulation language visible.
Use cyan for state, not decoration.
donts: Do not use crypto vocabulary, CEX brands, or USDT pricing.
Do not add real brokerage or live trading affordances.
Do not use decorative glassmorphism, gradient text, or neon terminal styling.
Do not nest cards inside cards.
